regulatory_risks: Changes in federal and state banking regulations and supervision
Capital and liquidity requirements under Basel III and Dodd-Frank Act
Enhanced prudential standards for banks with $100 billion or more in assets
Stress testing requirements and capital planning restrictions
Resolution planning and long-term debt requirements
Consumer protection laws and CFPB supervision
OFAC (Office of Foreign Assets Control) sanctions compliance
Privacy and cybersecurity regulations including NYSDFS cybersecurity requirements
Climate-related disclosure and risk management requirements
Interchange fee regulations and potential reductions
FDIC special assessments and increased deposit insurance costs
Federal Reserve monetary policy changes affecting interest rates
State-level banking and consumer protection regulations
Volcker Rule restrictions on proprietary trading
Executive compensation regulations and clawback requirements
